_comment: Frontend JS files that bypass the 50% coverage gate enforced by scripts/coverage-check.mjs. Paths are relative to the repo root; each key maps to a written reason. Prefer adding a test over adding an entry here. CI also fails if an excluded file has climbed above the threshold — delete stale entries when that happens.

files.playground/js/main/chart-pinch-zoom.js: Pure helpers (pinchZoomWindow, panZoomWindow) are covered by tests/pinch-zoom.test.mjs in the unit suite. The remaining lines are the multi-finger pointer-event state machine that disambiguates tap / long-press / pan / pinch, which Playwright's frontend project can't simulate without real two-touch gestures. Verified manually on the preview deploy.
